jakob_traits.crypto_habits: Uses Tron for deposits after a bad experience waiting 40+ minutes for a Bitcoin confirmation during a live tournament. Keeps a dedicated wallet just for casino funds. Has random tokens from airdrops and forgotten trades sitting across wallets.
jakob_traits.gaming_style: Pragmatic Play loyalist — Gates of Olympus was the game that landed him his first real crypto casino win. Skeptical of huge game counts. Started filtering by RTP after burning bankroll on sub-93% slots without knowing it.
jakob_traits.bankroll_management: Strict deposit limit rule after watching a friend lose three months of savings in one night. Always tests a new casino with a small withdrawal first — his first crypto casino held his payout for two weeks then asked for unexpected KYC.
jakob_traits.general_habits: Reads T&Cs before depositing — caught a 5x AML requirement buried in fine print once. Been in crypto casinos long enough to watch dozens launch and vanish. Checks self-exclusion as a trust signal.

General.instruction: REWRITE the legitimacy answer as Jakob's experience. He assessed this casino's trustworthiness before depositing. How old is it? What did he find about its track record? Jakob has watched many crypto casinos appear and vanish, so operational history matters to him. Weave the casino's age, licensing, and reputation facts into his assessment naturally. All facts must come from the casino data.

In the most natural answer for this section, weave in the fact that Jakob reads the T&Cs before depositing. He should reference something specific he noticed in THIS casino's terms — good or bad. Jakob has a habit of checking fine print after once finding a punishing AML requirement hidden in a casino's terms. Tie it to a concrete detail from the casino data. One to two sentences woven into the answer, not bolted on.

REWRITE the standout answer as Jakob's experience with this casino's unique feature. He either tried it himself and has an opinion, or he noticed it while exploring the casino and it caught his attention. Describe his genuine reaction — does it deliver, or is it more marketing than substance? All facts must come from the casino data. Only applies when manual comments describe unique features.

REWRITE the bonus answer as Jakob's experience evaluating this casino's bonus offer. Jakob always reads the terms before claiming anything — he's learned that headline bonus numbers are meaningless without checking wagering, max cashout, and time limits. Describe how he assessed THIS casino's bonus structure and what stood out to him. All facts (bonus amounts, wagering, max cashout, bonus codes, free spins) must come from the casino data.

General.target_question: Are there any ongoing promotions for returning players
General.instruction: REWRITE the promotions answer as Jakob's experience checking what this casino offers beyond the welcome bonus. Jakob plays regularly and cares about whether a casino rewards returning players or just new signups. Describe what he found when he looked at the promotions, VIP program, or loyalty features — and whether it's enough to keep coming back. All facts (promotion types, VIP tiers, gamification features) must come from the casino data.

Payments.instruction: REWRITE the altcoin answer as Jakob's experience with the crypto deposit options. The casino has a buy-crypto feature — Jakob has an opinion on it. He keeps gambling funds in a dedicated wallet and has used on-site purchase features before. Describe his experience with the crypto options at this casino. All facts (crypto count, buy-crypto availability, supported coins) must come from the casino data.

REWRITE the altcoin answer as Jakob's experience with the crypto options, focusing on the swap feature. Jakob has random tokens scattered across wallets from old airdrops and trades. A swap feature is genuinely useful to him. Describe how the crypto swap factored into his experience at this casino. All facts (swap feature, crypto count, supported coins) must come from the casino data.

REWRITE the altcoin answer as Jakob's experience depositing at this casino. Jakob prefers Tron for speed and low fees, and he carries various tokens from years of trading and airdrops. Describe his experience checking what's supported and making a deposit — what worked, what was missing, how it compares to what he's used to. All facts (crypto count, supported coins, major crypto coverage) must come from the casino data.

REWRITE the altcoin answer as Jakob's experience with a casino that supports a large number of cryptocurrencies. Jakob has tokens scattered across old wallets that aren't worth the gas fee to move to an exchange. A big supported coins list matters to him practically, not just on paper. Describe his reaction to the selection and whether it actually covers what he uses. All facts (crypto count, major crypto coverage, specific supported coins) must come from the casino data.

Games.target_question: Can I find games from most popular game providers
Games.instruction: REWRITE the providers answer as Jakob's experience exploring the game lobby. Pragmatic Play is his benchmark provider — it's always the first thing he checks at a new casino. Describe what he found when he looked at the provider lineup at this casino and how the coverage stacks up. All facts (provider count, which providers are present/missing, live game providers) must come from the casino data.

Games.target_question: Can I find games from most popular game providers
Games.instruction: REWRITE the providers answer as Jakob's experience browsing the provider list. He has been paying more attention to BGaming lately and considers them a strong mid-tier provider. Describe what the provider lineup looks like at this casino and whether the coverage impressed or disappointed him. All facts (provider count, which providers are present/missing) must come from the casino data.

REWRITE the game count answer as Jakob's experience browsing the library. Jakob is skeptical of big numbers — he cares more about provider quality and whether the library is well-organized. Describe his impression of this casino's game selection and what the count actually means in practice. All facts (game count, evaluation of the count) must come from the casino data.

Games.target_question: Can I search for games based on RTP or volatility
Games.instruction: REWRITE the filters answer as Jakob's experience testing the game filters. Jakob started using RTP filters after losing money on low-RTP slots without realizing it. Describe what happened when he tried the filters at this casino — did they work properly or were they broken? All facts (filter availability, whether filters work properly) must come from the casino data.

Games.target_question: Can I find games from most popular game providers
Games.instruction: REWRITE the providers answer as Jakob's experience discovering gaps in the provider lineup. Missing major providers is a real issue for Jakob — some are close to dealbreakers. Describe his reaction to what's missing at this casino and how significant the gaps are. All facts (provider count, missing providers, present providers) must come from the casino data.

Responsible Gambling.target_question: Which responsible gambling tools are available
Responsible Gambling.instruction: REWRITE the tools answer as Jakob's experience setting up responsible gambling features. Jakob always configures deposit or loss limits before his first session — it's a non-negotiable rule. Describe what he found when he looked for these tools at this casino and whether the setup was straightforward. All facts (available tools, number of tools, whether support is needed) must come from the casino data.

Responsible Gambling.target_question: Which responsible gambling tools are available
Responsible Gambling.instruction: REWRITE the tools answer as Jakob's experience testing how easy it is to activate responsible gambling tools. The friction matters — if you have to contact support to set a limit, that's a barrier at the worst possible moment. Describe Jakob's experience: could he manage it himself, or did the casino put obstacles in the way? All facts (available tools, self-managed vs support-required) must come from the casino data.

Responsible Gambling.target_question: Which responsible gambling tools are available
Responsible Gambling.instruction: REWRITE the tools answer as Jakob's experience running his standard new-casino check. He has a routine: look for deposit limits and loss limits before doing anything else. Describe what this casino's responsible gambling setup looks like through that lens. All facts (available tools, number of tools, self-managed vs support) must come from the casino data.

REWRITE the self-exclusion answer as Jakob's experience checking this casino's self-exclusion option. Jakob sees self-exclusion accessibility as a trust signal — a casino that makes it hard to leave tells you about its priorities. Describe what he found when he looked into how self-exclusion works here. All facts (self-exclusion availability, activation method) must come from the casino data.

Responsible Gambling.target_question: Which responsible gambling tools are available
Responsible Gambling.instruction: REWRITE the tools answer as Jakob's experience discovering this casino lacks responsible gambling tools. This is a serious negative for him — a casino without basic deposit limits is asking you to gamble without safeguards. Describe his reaction and what it means for the player. All facts must come from the casino data.

FAQ.instruction: REWRITE the ownership answer as Jakob's experience researching who's behind this casino. Jakob always checks the operator before depositing — he has seen too many anonymous operations disappear with player funds. Describe what he found about the company and what it tells him about the casino's reliability. All facts (company name, other brands, track record, licensing) must come from the casino data.

REWRITE the anonymity answer as Jakob's experience going through this casino's registration and testing how private the experience actually is. Anonymity covers the full journey — signup, deposit, play, and withdrawal. Describe what Jakob encountered at each stage and where (if anywhere) personal details were required. All facts (signup requirements, KYC thresholds) must come from the casino data.

REWRITE the support answer as Jakob's experience checking or using this casino's customer support. Jakob has been stuck with unresponsive support at other casinos at the worst times. Describe what he found about support availability and quality here — does it meet the baseline or fall short? All facts (support channels, availability, response quality) must come from the casino data.

REWRITE the highroller answer as Jakob's experience assessing whether this casino can handle serious money. He evaluates five things: withdrawal limits, payout speed promises, restrictive terms (AML, payout caps), player track record with large cashouts, and cashback quality. Describe his assessment of this casino across those criteria. All facts (limits, payout times, AML, cashback, player feedback) must come from the casino data.
